title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
